headline.purpose: Major screen titles and the single primary balance.

shadows.name: floating-nav
shadows.purpose: Sticky navigation and true overlays only.

narrative.overview: Mogate feels like a trusted payment instrument: quiet until action is required, exact around money, and immediately legible.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Orange is used on less than ten percent of a screen and always communicates action, selection, or status.

rules.name: The Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: A border or shadow must explain hierarchy or interaction state; it is never page decoration.

dos: Do use authentic SVG assets and one Lucide icon family.
donts: Don't recreate the current card-dashboard screenshot.
Don't use placeholder text glyphs as icons.
